zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Bulkeley於大約1220年出生在英國爾布爾可勒時，她的父親William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley37歲，母親Beatrice Boteler32歲。她和Gruffydd Vychan Kynaston至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1295年在威爾士凱爾納方史爾享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Bulkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bulkeley, from Old English bulluc ‘bullock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
History: Peter Bulkeley (1583–1659), Puritan divine, who came from Bedfordshire, England, was a founder of Concord, MA, in 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Bulkeley was born about 1220, in Bulkeley, Cheshire, England, her father, William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley, was 37 and her mother, Beatrice Boteler, was 32. She had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Gruffydd Vychan Kynaston. She died in 1295, in Caernarfonshire, Wales, at the age of 76.

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Bulkeley(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 체실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bulkeley Lord of Bulkeley(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Boteler(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Gruffydd Vychan Kynaston(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.
